parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ message: { subject: $('Parse & Prepare').first().json.emailSubject, body: { contentType: 'HTML', content: $('Parse & Prepare').first().json.emailHtml }, toRecipients: [{ emailAddress: { address: $('Parse & Prepare').first().json.lead.email } }], from: { emailAddress: { address: $('Parse & Prepare').first().json.mailUserUpn, name: 'OpsBlueprint' } } }, saveToSentItems: true }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ leadId: $('Parse & Prepare').first().json.leadId, fullName: $('Parse & Prepare').first().json.lead.fullName, email: $('Parse & Prepare').first().json.lead.email, company: $('Parse & Prepare').first().json.lead.company, industry: $('Parse & Prepare').first().json.lead.industry, problemDescription: $('Parse & Prepare').first().json.lead.problemDescription, serviceTier: $('Parse & Prepare').first().json.lead.serviceTier, suggestedTier: $('Parse & Prepare').first().json.qualification.suggestedTier, qualificationNotes: $('Parse & Prepare').first().json.qualification.qualificationNotes, estimatedValue: $('Parse & Prepare').first().json.qualification.estimatedValue, urgency: $('Parse & Prepare').first().json.qualification.urgency, source: $('Parse & Prepare').first().json.lead.source }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ message: { subject: '[OpsBlueprint Lead] ' + $('Parse & Prepare').first().json.lead.fullName + ' - ' + ($('Parse & Prepare').first().json.lead.company || 'No Company') + ' (Score: ' + $('Parse & Prepare').first().json.qualification.qualificationScore + '/10)', body: { contentType: 'HTML', content: '

Lead ID: ' + $('Parse & Prepare').first().json.leadId + ' | Source: ' + ($('Parse & Prepare').first().json.lead.source || 'Website') + '

' }, toRecipients: [{ emailAddress: { address: 'fxvarga@gmail.com' } }, { emailAddress: { address: 'fernandovargas@busybee690.onmicrosoft.com' } }], from: { emailAddress: { address: $('Parse & Prepare').first().json.mailUserUpn, name: 'OpsBlueprint Notifications' } } }, saveToSentItems: true }) }}
